overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The character walks through neon-lit downtown streets featuring large holographic billboards, wet reflective pavement, graffiti-covered walls, and sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: camera shifts to third-person perspective following character in green jacket
character turns left onto sidewalk after crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: character in green jacket and white pants crosses the intersection and turns left onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking across the street from right to left

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard displaying AVANTE advertisement with dark background
tall vertical billboard with CIRKUS BOLT text in red and blue neon
large billboard with JINGU text and image of reclining figure

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, dominated by large glowing billboards for AVANTE and CIRKUS BOLT. At 6 seconds, the perspective shifts to follow a character in a green jacket who crosses the wet asphalt street and turns left onto a sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with high graffiti-covered wall

events.description: entering narrower corridor with high graffiti walls on left side creating enclosed feeling
approaching elevated walkway structure with stairs and escalators visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the graffiti wall, approaching an intersection with an elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants and white top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art in green, pink, and blue
metal structure with stairs and escalators crossing above street level

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a high wall covered in vibrant graffiti. Street lamps illuminate the path as the character approaches an elevated walkway structure. A pedestrian in red pants walks toward the camera before passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with multiple crosswalks and digital billboards

events.description: character turns right at intersection to follow new street direction
vehicles pass through the intersection as character navigates the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right onto a new street with parked vehicles and trees

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large pink digital billboard displaying wide open text with abstract green imagery
tall brown building with vertical windows and multiple digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the graffiti corridor into a wide intersection dominated by a massive pink wide open billboard. After crossing the street and turning right, the view opens to show an art deco style building covered in digital screens and several vehicles passing through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined avenue with parked cars and commercial colonnade buildings

events.description: entering tree-lined section of street with parked vehicles and building colonnades

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past parked cars and building entrances with large concrete columns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in same direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: building with large concrete columns and steps leading to entrance with warm interior lighting
row of leafy trees lining the street between sidewalk and road
line of parked cars along the curb including a purple sedan and black coupe

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a tree-lined avenue with parked cars on the right and a colonnaded building on the left. The street is quieter here, with only a few pedestrians visible ahead, and the architecture shifts to include more greenery and classical building elements with large columns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk downtown that gradually transitions from dense commercial intersections to a quieter, classically inspired avenue. It begins at a futuristic city intersection dominated by glowing billboards for AVANTE and CIRKUS BOLT, following a character in a green jacket as they cross the wet asphalt and turn onto a sidewalk. The scene then narrows into a corridor bordered by a high, graffiti-covered wall under the glow of street lamps, passing a pedestrian in red pants before emerging back into a wide intersection beneath a massive pink billboard. As the character crosses the street and turns right, the view opens toward an art deco building clad in digital screens and passing vehicles, before finally shifting into a calmer, tree-lined avenue featuring parked cars and a colonnaded building with classical architectural elements.
